text:
is a line of figures by Bandai that aim to create highly articulated representations of giant robots from anime and such. They are mainly an alternative to model kits.

So far, seven figures of Evangelion units have been made, all from the Rebuild of Evangelion films, along with an accessory pack. None of the figures have proved to be exclusive, yet.
